items.message: No action needed: PR #37816 does not have pnpm-lock.yaml merge conflicts. The PR's `mergeable_state: blocked` is not due to a pnpm-lock.yaml conflict — the 3 changed files are `.github/aw/actions-lock.json`, `.github/workflows/pnpm-lock-conflict-resolver.lock.yml`, and `.github/workflows/pnpm-lock-conflict-resolver.md`. The `git merge FETCH_HEAD` completed cleanly with no conflicts. The PR is likely blocked due to its draft status or required status checks, not merge conflicts. No pnpm-lock.yaml conflict resolution is needed.
